title: (Reupload) this is just reversed
description:
Round 1 of Zocka vs. me for the second tennis tourney on the Youtubekacke forums

Originally released: 20. November 2010

Match got failed, because of Zocka's lack of ideas to make the next round. The lack of ideas is already seen on the first round, which considers of a video source reversed and without sound. Still, I won the match.
